parameters.description: The state of the pull requests to include in the result.

parameters.description: Source repository ref of the pull requests.

parameters.description: Source branch of the pull requests.

parameters.description: Target branch of the pull requests.

parameters.description: The substring by which the pull requests are filtered.

parameters.description: List of principal IDs who created pull requests.

parameters.name: created_lt
parameters.description: The result should contain only entries created before this timestamp (unix millis).

parameters.name: created_gt
parameters.description: The result should contain only entries created after this timestamp (unix millis).

parameters.name: updated_lt
parameters.description: The result should contain only entries updated before this timestamp (unix millis).

parameters.name: exclude_description
parameters.description: By providing this parameter the description would be excluded from the response.

parameters.name: include_subspaces
parameters.description: The result should contain entries from the desired space and of its subspaces.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: label_id
parameters.description: List of label ids used to filter pull requests.

parameters.name: value_id
parameters.description: List of label value ids used to filter pull requests.

parameters.name: author_id
parameters.description: Return only pull requests where this user is the author.

parameters.name: commenter_id
parameters.description: Return only pull requests where this user has created at least one comment.

parameters.name: mentioned_id
parameters.description: Return only pull requests where this user has been mentioned.

parameters.name: reviewer_id
parameters.description: Return only pull requests where this user has been added as a reviewer.

parameters.name: review_decision
parameters.description: Require only this review decision of the reviewer. Requires reviewer_id parameter.

parameters.name: include_checks
parameters.description: If true, the summary of check for the branch commit SHA would be included in the response.

parameters.name: include_rules
parameters.description: If true, a list of rules that apply to this branch would be included in the response.
